testcase.name: test_offers_for_countries_returns_empty_dict_for_empty_countries_set
testcase.failure:
def test_offers_for_countries_returns_empty_dict_for_empty_countries_set(): results = offers_for_countries("", set(), "", False) > assert not results E assert not <coroutine object offers_for_countries at 0x104f01d80>
test/simplejustwatchapi/test_justwatch.py:61: AssertionError
